title: Tech Weekly: Markets Start May on Tightrope After Mixed Earnings
author: Sigma Capital

excerpt: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq saw their biggest monthly gains since 2020, with weekly gains of 0.91% and 1.08% respectively, driven by positive sentiment after robust earnings. Despite mixed earnings, market stability remains uncertain as May begins.
